headline: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Stock Rises As Valuation Models Point In Different Directions
summary: Wondering whether Skyworks Solutions at US$73.97 is offering fair value right now, or if the price is out of line with what you are actually getting? The stock has returned 0.5% over the last week, 7.9% over the past month, 14.9% year to date, 8.2% over the past year, while longer term returns show a decline of 24.9% over three years and 49.2% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on how Skyworks Solutions fits into the broader semiconductor supply chain and how shifts in demand for...
